# sortName

**Instance Property**

The name of the artist to use when sorting.

## Declaration

```swift
var sortName: String? { get }
```

## Discussion

If `nil`, iTunes uses [doc://com.apple.ituneslibrary/documentation/iTunesLibrary/ITLibArtist/name] to sort by artist name.

## Getting Artist Info

- **name**: The name of the artist.
- **persistentID**: The unique identifier of the artist.
